27:I[305,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0srnp~a4huim5.js","/_next/static/chunks/0h8pu6ormhg7j.js","/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js"],"MermaidDiagram"]
28:I[36231,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0srnp~a4huim5.js","/_next/static/chunks/0h8pu6ormhg7j.js","/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js"],"CodeBlock"]
29:I[88125,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0srnp~a4huim5.js","/_next/static/chunks/0h8pu6ormhg7j.js","/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js"],"default"]
2a:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
2b:"$Sreact.suspense"
2e:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
30:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scoring Pipeline"}]
8:["$","$L27",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  Q[Query] -->|embed| V[Vector Score]\n  Q -->|tokenize| T[FTS5 Score]\n  M[Memory] -->|field| I[Importance]\n  V -->|0.5| F[Weighted Sum]\n  T -->|0.3| F\n  I -->|0.2| F\n  F -->|recency| R[Recency Multiplier]\n  R -->|sort| S[Ranked Results]\n"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Individual Scorers"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector Score"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Cosine similarity between query embedding and memory embedding:"}]
c:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"vector_score = dot(query_vec, mem_vec) / (norm(query_vec) * norm(mem_vec))\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Range: 0.0 (unrelated) to 1.0 (identical)"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"FTS5 Score"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"BM25 relevance score normalized to 0–1:"}]
10:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"fts_score = bm25_score / max_bm25_score_in_results\n","language":"python"}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Importance Score"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each memory has an ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," field (set at ingestion time, range 0.0–1.0). This is used directly as the importance component in scoring."]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Rank Fusion"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["The three components are combined with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fixed weights"}]," (not configurable per-query):"]}]
15:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"# Fixed-weight fusion for episodic memory\nbase_score = (vector_score * 0.5) + (fts_score * 0.3) + (importance * 0.2)\n","language":"python"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"This weighting balances semantic similarity (50%), exact term matching (30%), and user-specified importance (20%)."}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recency Decay"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"After fusion, a recency multiplier is applied to boost recently created memories:"}]
19:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"recency_decay = exp(-age_hours / half_life_hours)\nfinal_score = base_score * (0.7 + 0.3 * recency_decay)\n","language":"python"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"The formula ensures:"}]
1b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fresh memories"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"age ≈ 0"}],"): ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recency_decay ≈ 1.0"}]," → score multiplied by ~1.0"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Old memories"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"age >> half_life"}],"): ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recency_decay ≈ 0.0"}]," → score multiplied by ~0.7"]}],"\n"]}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"This gives a maximum 30% boost for recent content while preserving 70% of the score for older but relevant memories."}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Result Deduplication"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":"When the same memory appears in multiple result sets, Mnemosyne deduplicates and keeps the highest score:"}]
1f:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"# Deduplication strategy\nseen_ids = set()\nfor result in all_results:\n  if result.id not in seen_ids:\n      seen_ids.add(result.id)\n      yield result\n","language":"python"}]
20:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L29",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Fixed Weights"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["The scoring weights (0.5 / 0.3 / 0.2) are fixed and not configurable through the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," API. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," accepts only ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"top_k"}]," parameters."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
21:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
